{ "emailAttemptId": "38e9bb8f-2b04-4241-bc49-048b0ce86ce1", "communicationAttemptId": "dc8c102e-21c3-4383-91ad-178a59293869", "fromEmail": "SFA@conservice.com", "toEmail": "service@hcmud434.com", "ccEmail": "test@test.com, bridgehomes@conservice.com", "subject": "Start Service Request for Sewer - 11423 Bright Sun Dr - ", "body": "

Dear Harris County Mud #434 Team,

\n

We are requesting activation of Sewer service for the Property mentioned below. The required documents are attached for your reference.

\n

* Service Address: 11423 Bright Sun Dr
* Service Utility: Sewer False
* Name to appear on the bill:
* Tax ID: 1234567190
* Lockbox Code: NA (If Applicable)

\n

Once the appointment has been scheduled, please Reply All, with the following details:

\n

* Account number
* Service start date
* Meter Number
* Is Water/Electric/Gas currently flowing through the home?
* Cost (Specific to Trash for open market and not bundled)
* Next Bill Date
* Are there any deposits or fee's? If so, what are the amounts?
* Can we pay the deposit upfront or is it required to be on the first bill?

\n

All utility bills for need to be mailed directly to the following address for processing and payment. Payment information for the new accounts can be obtained by contacting - 8776477576

\n

Mailing Address:

C/O Conservice
PO Box 4698
Logan, UT 84323

\n

Best regards,
Conservice Team

", "attachmentDocumentId": null, "emailFoundOnlineLookupId": null, "emailDeliveredLookupId": 255, "providerRespondedLookupId": 256, "respondingEmailAddress": "service@hcmud434.com" }
